description:
Urban Electronics wants to identify and reward their highest-spending customer. Build a customer revenue report, then create a targeted VIP promotion based on what it reveals.

Build the Customer Revenue Report: Create a Views page at /admin/commerce/customer-revenue, restricted to users with 'access commerce administration pages' permission. Use Commerce Orders as the base entity with a User relationship through the order's uid field. Enable aggregation to group results by customer, displaying: Username, Number of Orders (COUNT of order IDs), and Total Spent (SUM of order total prices). Filter to only include completed orders. Sort by Total Spent descending, 25 items per page.

Reward the Top Customer: Use your report to identify the customer with the highest total spending. Create an active promotion named 'VIP Reward - [username]' (using their actual username) offering 20% off their next order of $100 or more. Add coupon code 'VIP-[USERNAME]' (uppercase) with a single-use limit.

Navigation: Add a menu link titled 'Customer Revenue' pointing to /admin/commerce/customer-revenue in the Main navigation.
